text:
In the first scene, I find myself standing outside a glass-walled room, watching people work amidst ladders and scattered tools. I feel a quiet sense of anticipation, as if I am witnessing the birth of something new, yet I remain an observer, slightly detached from the creative process.

In the second scene, vibrant colors and bold text surround me in an exhibition space. The words "R + D" and messages about innovation inspire me, stirring in me a sense of intellectual curiosity and playful wonder. I am drawn to ponder how human ingenuity and philosophical questioning intertwine; I feel energized and eager to explore ideas.
